node.statement: (Extension to inequality and mixed constraints). The same argument works for inequality constraints φ(a_j) ≤ β_j or mixed equality/inequality: the Weis-Shirokov theorem (Node 1.2) applies to both sublevel sets and level sets, and the inductive argument treats each constraint independently, whether it is an equality or inequality. Hence the bound dim_R(π_φ(A)'^{sa}) ≤ m + 1 holds for all three constraint types.
